blockedAssertions.blockedBy: `crud_and_errors` proves `openai-beta: assistants=v2` on create/retrieve/update/delete routes, but the observed list/search test only proves route and payload shape; it does not directly assert beta-header injection for list or search, so the full assertion is not directly proven by cargo output plus inspected test coverage.

The passing polling-helper test directly proves poll-helper headers and explicit/server-driven interval handling, but it only exercises `in_progress -> completed` flows and does not directly prove that failed or cancelled terminal states remain visible to the caller.
